findings.description: Anonymous chat scoping relies on possession of the browser-generated clientSessionId rather than a server-issued/HttpOnly anonymous identity. This is acceptable for local unauthenticated development scope but should be replaced or hardened before treating anonymous sessions as production security boundaries.

Validation was static code review only: I did not run lint/check/build/test or manually exercise Convex seed/clear flows because validator procedure defaults defer commands/live testing unless explicitly requested. Worker handoffs did not include command output evidence.
